3505003045.detail_text: BRAND : FRAIS DEVANT Product Description : Indulge your taste buds with the exquisite flavors of Frais Devant’s Organic Corsican Lonzo. Crafted according to the time-honored Corsican art of charcuterie, this Lonzo is a mouth-watering blend of the finest cuts of pork, seasoned and cured to perfection in the picturesque region of Corsica. With its rich, nutty flavor and delicate, melt-in-mouth texture, this premium organic cold cut is sure to elevate your aperitif or raclette experience. As an added benefit, our Organic Corsican Lonzo is made from free-range pigs fed a 100% organic diet, making it a healthier choice for conscious consumers. Country of Origin : FRANCE How to Use : Our Organic Corsican Lonzo is a versatile addition to any gourmet pantry. Enjoy it thinly sliced as part of a charcuterie board, with some artisanal French cheese, crusty bread, and a glass of full-bodied red wine. You can also add it to your raclette ensemble, pair it with some sautéed potatoes and pickles, or use it to enhance the flavors of your pasta dishes or salads. Suggested Recipes / Uses : Our Organic Corsican Lonzo can be used to add a touch of French elegance to a variety of dishes. Try it in a classic Corsican-style omelette with fresh herbs, or use it to top a homemade pizza, along with figs, goat cheese, and a drizzle of honey. It also makes a delicious filling for a rustic French sandwich, paired with brie and some peppery arugula. Alternatively, use it to create a luxurious tartine, topped with caramelized onions, melted gruyère, and a sprinkling of thyme. #Organic Corsican Lonzo#French charcuterie#Cold cuts for raclette#Organic pork cold cuts#Premium aperitif charcuterie#Frais Devant Lonzo#Corsican Lonzo recipes#Healthy organic cold cuts.

3504998038.detail_text: BRAND : LAUDES Product Description : Experience the essence of Spanish cuisine with Laudes' Jamón de Cebo de campo ibérico loncheado - 50% raza ibérica. Sourced from free-range pigs that roam lush Spanish pastures, this exquisite cold cut is a delicacy that evokes the authentic flavor of Iberian ham. The pigs are fed a diet of grains and acorns, which infuses the meat with a distinct, rich flavor that is both savory and sweet. Each slice is expertly hand-carved to ensure the finest quality and taste. Laudes is a trusted name in Spanish charcuterie, known for their dedication to maintaining traditional curing methods. Country of Origin : NA How to Use : Laudes' Jamón de Cebo de campo ibérico loncheado is perfect for serving straight from the packet. Allow the ham slices to warm to room temperature to get the best flavor. Place it on a wooden board alongside some olives, cheese, or crusty bread for a quick and delicious tapas dish. It also makes an excellent addition to sandwiches or served on top of a hot piece of toast for breakfast. Suggested Recipes / Uses : For a traditional Mediterranean feel, try pairing the jamón with ripe figs and a drizzle of balsamic glaze. It's also a great addition to a Spanish omelette or incorporated into a classic paella for that extra depth of flavor. Alternatively, wrap the slices around melon or asparagus for a refreshing appetizer. If you're a pasta lover, toss it into a spaghetti carbonara for a unique twist. #Spanish Iberian ham#Laudes Jamón de Cebo de campo#Cold cut delicacies#Spanish charcuterie#Tapas dish#Traditional Spanish cuisine#Authentic Iberian ham#Gourmet cold cuts.
